sections.paragraph: διότι [= διὰ τοῦτο ὅτι] this conj. introduces a rationale or motive for the affirmation that precedes it; in most passages δ. can be understood as in view of the fact that, because Lk 1:13; 2:7; 21:28; Ac 18:10ab; 22:18; Ro 1:19, 21; 8:7, 21 v.l.; 1 Cor 15:9; Phil 2:26; 1 Th 2:8, 18; 4:6; Hb 11:5, 23; Js 4:3; 1 Pt 1:16, 24; 2:6. —In related vein, as inference therefore, hence Ac 13:35; 20:26; sim. as valid conclusion from what precedes it follows then, so Ro 3:20; 8:7.
